info.title: Workspace App API
info.description:
A comprehensive project management API with features including:
        - Workspace and team management with subscription plans
        - Hierarchical task organization (Workspaces → Spaces → Lists → Tasks)
        - Real-time collaboration via WebSockets
        - Recurring tasks with cron-based automation
        - Task dependencies with cascading logic
        - Advanced analytics and reporting
        - File attachments via Cloudinary
        - Activity tracking and commenting
        - Custom fields and time tracking
        - Custom tables with Excel-like features
        - Document management and collaboration
        - Direct messaging between users
        - Push notifications (FCM)
        - Entitlement and subscription management
        - Super admin dashboard

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token in the format: Bearer <token>

PermissionLevel.description: Allowed levels: FULL, EDIT, COMMENT, VIEW. Evaluation follows hierarchical overrides (List > Folder > Space > Workspace). Assignees gain implicit EDIT rights for their specific tasks.

avatar.description: Legacy URL to profile picture (use profilePicture instead)

NotificationPreferences.description: Granular notification preference settings. All fields are optional — only send what you want to change.

taskAssigned.description: Notify when a task is assigned to you

taskStatusChange.description: Notify when a followed task changes status

taskUpdates.description: Notify on task description/priority updates, subtasks, dependencies, file uploads

groupChats.description: Global toggle for all workspace group chat notifications

mentions.description: Notify when @mentioned in a comment or chat

comments.description: Notify on comments on tasks you follow

notices.description: Notify on invitations, announcements, and system notices

mutedChannels.description: Array of channel IDs (or 'workspace_<workspaceId>') whose notifications are suppressed. Pass full array to replace.

mutedUsers.description: Array of user IDs whose DM notifications are suppressed. Pass full array to replace.

status.description: Real-time clock-in status. 'active' means currently clocked into a task, 'inactive' means clocked out.

HierarchySpace.description: Filtered view of a space in the workspace tree. Visible if user is a member OR has an assigned task within the space.

data.description: Optional payload depending on the request

isMilestone.description: Whether task is a milestone (startDate === dueDate)

dependencySource.description: Source task ID (the task that must be completed first)

dependencyTarget.description: Target task ID (the task that depends on the source)

type.description: Dependency type: FS (Finish-to-Start), SS (Start-to-Start), FF (Finish-to-Finish), SF (Start-to-Finish)

leadTime.description: Average days from creation to completion

maxSpaces.description: Maximum number of spaces per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxLists.description: Maximum number of lists per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxFolders.description: Maximum number of folders per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxTasks.description: Maximum number of tasks per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxMembers.description: Maximum number of members per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxDocuments.description: Maximum number of documents per workspace (-1 for unlimited)

maxDirectMessagesPerUser.description: Maximum direct messages per recipient (-1 for unlimited)

hasAccessControl.description: Whether advanced access control is enabled

messageLimit.description: Maximum number of workspace messages (-1 for unlimited)

canUseCustomRoles.description: Whether custom roles feature is available

canCreateTables.description: Whether custom tables feature is available

maxTablesCount.description: Maximum number of custom tables (-1 for unlimited)

maxRowsLimit.description: Maximum rows per table (-1 for unlimited)

maxColumnsLimit.description: Maximum columns per table (-1 for unlimited)

workspaceId.description: Required workspace scope for this DM.

content.example: Hey! Did you see the new update?
Great work! Can we also handle the edge case?

removeAvatar.description: Set to 'true' to delete the current profile picture

removeCoverPhoto.description: Set to 'true' to delete the current cover photo

status.description: Task status. Note: 'in-progress' is normalized to 'inprogress' internally.

assignee.description: User ID of the assignee. Set to null to unassign.

dueDate.description: Task due date. Set to null to clear.

startDate.description: Task start date. Set to null to clear.

status.description: Task status. Both 'in-progress' and 'inprogress' are accepted.

assignee.description: User ID of the assignee. Set to null to unassign.

dueDate.description: Task due date. Set to null to clear.

startDate.description: Task start date. Set to null to clear.

tags.name: 0. ⭐ Primary Dashboard
tags.description: 🚀 ALL-IN-ONE consolidated data endpoint. Use GET /api/workspaces/{id}/analytics for the main Flutter screen — returns workspace stats, hierarchy, members, tasks, announcements, timer, sticky note, and performance in a single call.

tags.name: 1.1 Auth — Login & Registration
tags.description: Register a new account, login, and obtain JWT tokens.

tags.name: 1.2 Auth — Password & Profile
tags.description: Forgot password, reset password, get & update own user profile.

tags.name: 2.1 Workspaces — Core CRUD
tags.description: Create, read, update and delete workspaces. Includes settings and workspace hierarchy.

tags.name: 2.2 Workspaces — Members
tags.description: List, add, update, and remove members from a workspace.

tags.name: 2.3 Workspaces — Invitations
tags.description: Send, accept, decline, and revoke workspace invitations. Includes public join links.

tags.name: 2.4 Workspaces — Custom Roles
tags.description: Assign and update custom role titles for workspace members.

tags.name: 2.5 Workspaces — Logo
tags.description: Upload and manage the workspace logo via Cloudinary.

tags.name: 2.6 Workspaces — Announcements
tags.description: Create, list, and delete workspace-wide announcements.

tags.name: 3.1 Hierarchy — Spaces
tags.description: Create, list, update, delete Spaces inside a workspace. Spaces are the top-level containers in the hierarchy.

tags.name: 3.2 Hierarchy — Space Members
tags.description: Manage members inside a Space — add, update role, remove.

tags.name: 3.3 Hierarchy — Space Invitations
tags.description: Invite users to a Space, accept/decline space invitations.

tags.name: 3.4 Hierarchy — Folders
tags.description: Create, list, update, delete Folders inside a Space.

tags.name: 3.5 Hierarchy — Folder Members
tags.description: Manage members inside a Folder — add, update role, remove.

tags.name: 3.6 Hierarchy — Lists
tags.description: Create, list, update, delete Lists inside a Space or Folder.

tags.name: 3.7 Hierarchy — List Members
tags.description: Manage members inside a List — add, update role, remove.

tags.name: 3.8 Hierarchy — Projects (Overview)
tags.description: Legacy project-level overview routes that span the full hierarchy.

tags.name: 4.1 Tasks — Core CRUD
tags.description: Create, read, update, delete tasks. Includes assignees, priority, status, due dates, subtasks, and bulk operations.

tags.name: 4.2 Tasks — Dependencies
tags.description: Gantt-style task dependencies: Finish-to-Start, Start-to-Start, Finish-to-Finish, Start-to-Finish.

tags.name: 4.3 Tasks — Recurring
tags.description: Set up recurring tasks with daily/weekly/monthly/custom frequency. Manage and preview the recurring schedule.

tags.name: 4.4 Tasks — Custom Fields
tags.description: Define and manage custom fields (text, number, date, select…) attached to tasks in a list.

tags.name: 5.1 Collaboration — Activity & Comments
tags.description: Task activity feed: comments, field-change logs, mentions, and emoji reactions.

tags.name: 5.2 Collaboration — Chat Channels
tags.description: Workspace group chat channels — create, join, post messages, manage members.

tags.name: 5.3 Collaboration — Direct Messages
tags.description: One-to-one direct messaging between workspace members.

tags.name: 5.4 Collaboration — Presence
tags.description: Real-time user presence and online status within a workspace.

tags.name: 6.1 Files — Uploads (Cloudinary)
tags.description: Upload images, videos, and raw files directly to Cloudinary. General-purpose upload endpoints.

tags.name: 6.2 Files — Task Attachments
tags.description: Attach and manage files on individual tasks.

tags.name: 6.3 Files — Workspace Files
tags.description: Workspace-level file library — upload, list, download, and delete shared files.

tags.name: 6.4 Files — Documents
tags.description: Rich-text document management: create, edit, nest, archive workspace documents.

tags.name: 7.1 Time — Entries (Timesheets)
tags.description: Log, update and delete manual time entries on tasks. View timesheets by user or workspace.

tags.name: 7.2 Time — Tracking (Live Timer)
tags.description: Start/stop a live running timer on a task. View the currently active timer.

tags.name: 7.3 Time — Attendance (Clock In/Out)
tags.description: Clock in and out of the workspace. View and export attendance records.

tags.name: 7.4 Time — Performance Metrics
tags.description: Completion rate, average task time, deadline success rate, and comparative team performance.

tags.name: 8.1 Tables — Core CRUD
tags.description: Create and manage Excel-like custom tables inside a Space: columns, rows, cell data, and styling.

tags.name: 8.2 Tables — Members
tags.description: Control access to individual custom tables — add, update role, and remove table members.

tags.name: 9.1 Admin — Plans
tags.description: Manage subscription plans: create, list, update, delete plans and their limits.

tags.name: 9.2 Admin — Subscriptions
tags.description: User subscription lifecycle: activate, check status, and expire subscriptions.

tags.name: 9.3 Admin — Payments
tags.description: Payment initiation, verification (eSewa / Khalti), and payment history.

tags.name: 9.4 Admin — Entitlements
tags.description: Feature-gate checks: verify if a workspace/user is allowed to perform an action based on their plan.

tags.name: 9.5 Admin — Super Admin
tags.description: Internal super-admin dashboard: platform-wide stats, user management, plan overrides.

tags.name: 9.6 Admin — Feedback
tags.description: Submit, list, and resolve user feedback and bug reports.

tags.name: 9.7 Admin — Currency
tags.description: Supported currencies and exchange rates used for plan pricing.

tags.name: 10.1 Utilities — Global Search
tags.description: Full-text search across tasks, spaces, lists, documents, and members in a workspace.

tags.name: 10.2 Utilities — Notification Center
tags.description: In-app notification feed: list, mark read, and clear notifications.

tags.name: 10.3 Utilities — Push Notification Devices
tags.description: Register and manage FCM device tokens for push notifications.

tags.name: 11.1 Personal — Sticky Notes
tags.description: Get and update a personal sticky note scoped to the user's workspace dashboard.

tags.name: 12. Webhooks
tags.description: External integration endpoints for GitHub and other third-party services.

tags.name: 13. GitHub Integration
tags.description: Configure GitHub repositories and webhooks for real-time space activity.

get.description:
Retrieve activity logs with optional filters.
**Access Control:** Owners/Admins see all workspace activity; regular members see only their own logs.
Retrieve all comments for a specific task.

post.description: Post a new comment on a task. Supports @mentions by including user IDs in the `mentions` array.

get.description: Returns all activity (comments, status changes, assignments) for a specific task, newest first.
Aggregates activity from all lists inside the folder and returns a unified, time-sorted feed.

put.description: Edit an existing comment. Only the comment author can edit it.

delete.description: Delete a comment. Author or workspace admin can delete.

post.description: Add an emoji reaction to a comment. If the same emoji already exists from the user, it toggles off.

delete.description: Remove your emoji reaction from a comment.

get.description:
Returns activity logs for the entire workspace.
**Access Control:**
- **Owners/Admins:** See all workspace activity
- **Members:** See only their own personal activity

post.description:
Generates a signed upload URL for direct client-to-Cloudinary uploads.

**Two-Step Upload Process:**
1. Call this endpoint to get upload credentials
2. Upload file directly to Cloudinary from client
3. Call confirm endpoint with Cloudinary response

**Benefits:**
- Faster uploads (direct to CDN)
- Reduced server load
- Better user experience

Saves attachment metadata after successful Cloudinary upload.

**Call this after:**
1. Getting credentials from init-upload
2. Uploading file to Cloudinary
3. Receiving Cloudinary response

**Automatic Features:**
- Thumbnail generation for images
- File size and MIME type extraction
- Secure URL generation

get.summary: Get all attachments for a task
get.description: Retrieves all file attachments associated with a task from Cloudinary

delete.description:
Deletes an attachment from both the database and Cloudinary.

**Cleanup Process:**
1. Removes file from Cloudinary using public_id
2. Deletes database record
3. Returns confirmation

**Automatic Cleanup:**
When a task is hard-deleted, all attachments are automatically removed.

get.summary: Get all recurring tasks in a workspace
get.description: Retrieves all active recurring tasks within a workspace

get.summary: Get instances of a recurring task
get.description:
Retrieves all task instances that were automatically created from a recurring task.

Each time a recurring task is processed by the cron job, a new instance is created
with isRecurring=false and recurringTaskId pointing to the original task.

post.description:
Stops a recurring task from creating new instances.

This sets isRecurring=false and clears the nextOccurrence date.
Existing instances are not affected.

404.description: Task not found or not a recurring task

post.description:
Manually triggers the recurring task processor (normally runs via cron every hour).

**Processing Logic:**
1. Finds all tasks where isRecurring=true AND nextOccurrence <= now
2. Checks if recurrenceEnd has not been exceeded
3. Clones each task (copies title, description, priority, assignee, etc.)
4. Sets cloned task status to 'todo' and isRecurring to false
5. Updates original task's nextOccurrence based on frequency and interval
6. Emits real-time socket events for new tasks

**Frequency Calculation:**
- daily: adds interval days
- weekly: adds interval * 7 days
- monthly: adds interval months
- custom: adds interval days

**Use Case:** Testing or immediate processing without waiting for cron

Returns full task details including assignee, custom fields, subtask count, and time tracking summary.

patch.description:
Updates task properties. Automatically tracks changes and creates activity entries.

**Auto-tracked fields:**
- Status changes
- Assignee changes
- Priority changes
- Due date changes
- Start date changes
- Title changes

**Gantt Integration:**
When startDate or dueDate is changed, dependent tasks are automatically cascaded
based on their dependency type (FS, SS, FF, SF).

**Completion Tracking:**
When status changes to 'done', completedAt timestamp is automatically set.

delete.description: Soft deletes a task (sets isDeleted flag). Also cleans up associated attachments from Cloudinary.

post.description: Creates a subtask under a parent task

get.description: Retrieves all subtasks of a parent task

post.description:
Creates a dependency relationship between two tasks for Gantt chart functionality.

**Dependency Types:**
- **FS (Finish-to-Start):** Target task can't start until source task finishes
- **SS (Start-to-Start):** Target task can't start until source task starts
- **FF (Finish-to-Finish):** Target task can't finish until source task finishes
- **SF (Start-to-Finish):** Target task can't finish until source task starts

**Cascading Logic:**
When the source task's dates change, the target task's dates are automatically
adjusted based on the dependency type. This cascades through the entire dependency chain.

**Circular Dependency Protection:**
The system prevents circular dependencies using a visited set during cascade operations.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: Target task ID (the task that depends on another)

dependencySource.description: Source task ID (the task that must be completed first)

400.description: Validation error or circular dependency detected

get.description: Retrieves all tasks that the current task depends on (tasks blocking this one)

get.description: Retrieves all tasks that depend on the current task (tasks blocked by this one)

get.summary: 🚀 PRIMARY DASHBOARD — Get All Workspace Data in One Call
get.description:
### ⭐ Consolidated Workspace Data
**What you get in one call:**

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `workspace` | Workspace name and details |
| `stats` | Total tasks, completion rate, priority & status breakdown |
| `hierarchy` | Full tree: Spaces → Folders → Lists |
| `members` | Who is clocked in right now (sorted: active first) |
| `tasks` | Workspace tasks (full set, newest first) |
| `announcements` | Latest workspace announcements |
| `currentRunningTimer` | The logged-in user's active timer (if any) |
| `stickyNote` | The logged-in user's personal sticky note for this workspace |
| `recentActivity` | Recent actions performed in this workspace |
| `performance` | Performance metrics for the user (and team for admins) |

**Performance:** MongoDB `$facet` + `Promise.all` → sub-second response on mobile.
